programmes.title: Blade Runner
programmes.description: In the smog-choked dystopian Los Angeles of 2019, blade runner Rick Deckard is called out of retirement to terminate a quartet of replicants who have escaped to Earth seeking their creator for a way to extend their short life spans. Special police brigades, the Blade Runners, had orders to kill all those who had not complied with the sentence. But this was not called execution, it was called "retirement." After a serious incident, former Blade Runner Rick Deckard is called back into service to find and "retire" some rogue Replicants.

programmes.title: Tendre Poulet
programmes.description: Lise Tanquerelle, commissaire à la ville, rencontre par hasard Antoine Lemercier, une vieille connaissance d'école, le jour où elle le renverse avec sa voiture. Il s'impose dans sa vie mouvementée, car Lise enquête sur des meurtres en série de plusieurs députés. Elle decouvre que tous fréquentaient la même callgirl... Ces retrouvailles donnent lieu à une relation naissance, mais Lise passe sous silence sa profession, Antoine n'a pas conservé de bon sourvenirs de jeunesse de la police. Parallèlement à cette romance naissante, Lise est chargée d'enquêter sur une série de meurtres étranges : en quelques jours, trois députés assassinés successivement avec le même modus operandi : un poinçon de sellerie planté dans le dos des victimes.

programmes.title: North by Northwest
programmes.description: Advertising man Roger Thornhill is mistaken for a spy, triggering a deadly cross-country chase. Famous for a wild plane attack and a harrowing chase across the faces of Mount Rushmore, this is quintessential Hitchcock.

programmes.title: Vertigo
programmes.description: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

programmes.title: Oppenheimer
programmes.description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II. An unprecedented cinematic event, Oppenheimer features an all-star cast that includes Emily Blunt, Oscar? winner Matt Damon, Oscar? nominee Robert Downey Jr., Oscar? nominee Florence Pugh, Josh Hartnett, and Oscar? winners Casey Affleck, Rami Malek and Kenneth Branagh.
